name: Wolne Lektury
description: Discover Wolne Lektury ebooks, audiobooks, authors, genres, themes, and detailed work metadata.

auth.hint: No API key is required for the documented public GET endpoints.

tools.name: list_books
tools.description: List all works in the Wolne Lektury catalog.

tools.name: get_book
tools.description: Retrieve detailed metadata for one work by slug.

params.name: slug
params.description: Work slug from a list result href.

tools.name: list_authors
tools.description: List authors represented in the catalog.

tools.name: get_author
tools.description: Retrieve one author and linked catalog data by slug.

params.name: slug
params.description: Author slug from a list result href.
